criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance the shopping experience.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer information, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, usability studies.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of features offered by the app, such as personalized recommendations, virtual try-ons, and price comparisons.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, user reviews, developer information.

criteria.name: Market Presence
criteria.description: The popularity and user base of the app, indicating its reach and acceptance in the market.
criteria.sources: Download statistics, user reviews, market analysis reports.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The uniqueness and novelty of the app's features and approach to AI-powered shopping.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, industry reviews, developer information.
